titleJa: 相互運用性は roadmap 上の理想論ではなく、設計前提に近づき始める
titleEn: Interoperability is starting to move from roadmap rhetoric to design premise
summaryJa: 2025年7月時点では、Google Cloud の A2A donation と MCP 連携の発表により、agent 間接続やデータ接続を vendor-internal feature のまま閉じない設計が現実味を帯びていた。
summaryEn: By July 2025, Google's A2A donation and MCP integration announcements made interoperability across agents and data systems look less like a roadmap talking point and more like a practical design direction.

publishedSources.label: tau-bench: A Benchmark for Tool-Agent-User Interaction in Real-World Domains
The BrowserGym Ecosystem for Web Agent Research
OpenAI: New tools and features in the Responses API
Google Cloud: New MCP integrations to Google Cloud Databases
Google Developers Blog: Google Cloud donates A2A to Linux Foundation
